name: Aquila Favonia
desc: The soul of the Knights of Favonius. Millennia later, it still calls on the winds of swift justice to vanquish all evil — just like the last heroine who wielded it.

string_values: ATK is increased by 20%/25%/30%/35%/40%. Triggers on taking DMG: the soul of the Falcon of the West awakens, holding the banner of resistance aloft, regenerating HP equal to 100%/115%/130%/145%/160% of ATK and dealing 200%/230%/260%/290%/320% of ATK as DMG to surrounding opponents. This effect can only occur once every 15s.

list.desc: All knew the falcon's protection was a blessing of Favonius.</br>Few knew the blessing of Favonius was from a distant tribe.</br>Under the tyranny of the old nobles, Mondstadt cried for freedom.</br>Enslaved was the exiled foreign fighter in the land of wind.</br>Yet she knelt not before injustice and deception, but set a shining example.</br>For she overthrew the barbaric nobles and established a chivalric order and the Church.</br>Blessed was she to eventually walk with the gods.</br>This was her sword that witnessed all her hardships and feats.</br>A testament to her achievement in spreading justice across Mondstadt.</br>You can feel her unrelenting spirit when swinging this sword:</br>Justice for the oppressed.</br>Freedom for the shackled.</br>Wisdom for the deceived.</br>Let the wind of justice and freedom lead.</br>

content.text: is available from all Weapon Event Wishes, even when it is not a featured Weapon with a boosted drop-rate.

content.name: Lost Prayer to the Sacred Winds
Lost Prayer to the Sacred Winds
